zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Maxwell於1358年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡爾德武德時，她的父親John Maxwell 4th of Pollok22歲，母親Elizabeth Lindsay11355歲。她於1380年之後與Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure在蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1414年1月1日在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾登努享年56歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭莫雷吉可米可艾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Maxwell于1358年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾卡爾德武德时，她的父亲John Maxwell 4th of Pollok22岁，母亲Elizabeth Lindsay11355岁。她于1380年之后与Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure在苏格兰艾斯爾馬波爾结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1414年1月1日在英国苏格兰艾斯爾登努享年56岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰莫雷吉可米可艾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Maxwell was born in 1358, in Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, was 22 and her mother, Elizabeth Lindsay, was 11355. She married Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure after 1380, in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 1 January 1414, in Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Kirkmichael, Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Maxwell est née en 1358, à Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lindsay, avait 11355 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure après 1380, à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1414, à Dunure, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Kirkmichael, Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Maxwell 1358 in Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Maxwell 4th of Pollok 22 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Lindsay 11355. Sie hat nach 1380 in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1414 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Dunure, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Kirkmichael, Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Maxwell è nata il nel 1358 nel Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Lindsay, aveva 11355 anni. Lei sposato Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure dopo il 1380, nel Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 gennaio 1414, nel Dunure, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Kirkmichael, Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Maxwellが1358年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアカルデルウッドで生まれた時，父John Maxwell 4th of Pollokは22歳，母Elizabeth Lindsayは11355歳であった。1380年以後にスコットランドエイルシュアイアメイボルでSir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunureと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1414年1月1日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアダヌアで56歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドモーアイキルクミチャエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Maxwell(이)가 1358년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 캘더우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Maxwell 4th of Pollok(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Lindsay(은)는 11355세였다. 그녀는 1380년 이후 스컷랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에서 Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1414년 1월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 던르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이 커크믹하얼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Maxwell nasceu em 1358, em Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lindsay, tinha 11355 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure após 1380, em Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1414, em Dunure, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Kirkmichael, Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Maxwell родилась в 1358 г. в местности калдирвуд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Maxwell 4th of Pollok было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lindsay, 11355. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure после 1380 г. в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 января 1414 г. в местности дунур, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности киркмачаел, мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Maxwell nació en 1358, en Calderwood, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Lindsay, tenía 11355 años. Se casó con Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure después de 1380, en Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de enero de 1414, en Dunure, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Kirkmichael, Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido.
